title: cynoglossum creticum
intro: Cynoglossum creticum, also known as the Cretan Hound's Tongue, is a plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is also believed to have health benefits including reducing fever and alleviating pain. In herbal preparations, Cynoglossum creticum is often used as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and may also be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
